top_signals.title: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.

top_signals.title: Wood Mackenzie: LNG carriers face compliance-driven fleet bifurcation as EU maritime carbon costs reach US$1,256/tonne by 2030
top_signals.summary: The engine type fitted to an LNG carrier when it was built is now the single most important factor in its compliance cost exposure. For a growing share of the global fleet, the numbers are turning against them, according to new analysis from Wood Mackenzie. The LNG shipping fleet is splitting into two. On one ...
